name: towow-mode-toolkit
description: Runtime mode + capability-routing + evidence-emit substrate for Towow runs. Ships the PreToolUse capability-router (mode-enforced tool allowlist/denylist + shadow logging), the PostToolUse evidence-emit hook (auto-captures step-level evidence packets), the /mode skill family (plan/build/verify/release transitions gated against .towow/state/mode + review-contract bindings), and the mode-contract.md runtime-state-variable specification. Sibling to towow-review-toolkit (WP-037). Second asset-unit export per 03-design.md §11.1 — the mode-first control plane becomes importable.
